summary: Added floating DFM tab pop-out windows.
details: Right-clicking a DFM tab now temporarily moves the live tab page into a draggable, resizable floating window, so users can view and interact with two DFM tabs at the same time.
The floating tab keeps the original tab controls and state because the live tab DOM is moved instead of mirrored.
DFM tab pop-outs use shell-style minimize, maximize, and close/dock controls and can be resized from every edge and corner.
Opening a DFM page now refreshes Ratios and Results immediately, even before those tabs are visited.
Popping out the Ratios or Results tab still performs an immediate table render if needed.
